title: Festuca tatrae
taxonomy: Festuca tatrae is classified as a species within the genus Festuca, which belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Europe. The genus Festuca contains over 200 species, and F. tatrae is one of the less common species within this group. This species is typically found in high-altitude meadows and rocky outcrops. F. tatrae is a member of the subgenus Festuca, which is characterized by its distinctive inflorescence and leaf morphology.
